chain.thought: Explanation: The only college that appears more than once is Wake Forest, attended by both Dustin Lyman and Reggie Austin. Therefore, they are the draftees who attended the same college as a fellow 2000 draftee.

judge_thought: Explanation: The question asks which 2000 draftees attended the same college as another draftee from the same class. In the table, Wake Forest appears twice: Dustin Lyman (TE) and Reggie Austin (DB) are both from Wake Forest. All other colleges listed are unique to a single player. Therefore, "dustin lyman|reggie austin" is correct.
